title: Loom assumption ledger entry
description: Machine shape of one entry in plans/assumptions.md. Rules: loom/core/epistemics.md; audit: loom/verification/weak-assumptions.md.

status.description: broken → every artifact in used_in must be marked stale. Entries are never deleted.

basis.description: Evidence or origin. A prior ('usually true') must identify itself as one.

risk_if_wrong.description: Canonical Markdown scalar: severity, dash, then one concrete impact sentence.

verify_by.description: An event, not an intention: a gate ('G1 exit'), a WO start ('before WO-004'), or an ISO date. Must precede the assumption's first irreversible use.

used_in.description: Canonical Markdown comma-separated artifact/WO references. The linter resolves each reference.

resolution_note.description: For verified/broken/retired: what was learned, dated.
